name: python3-lazr.restfulclient
title: python3-lazr.restfulclient
description:
client for lazr.restful-based web services (Python 3)
A programmable client library that takes advantage of the commonalities
among lazr.rest web services to provide added functionality on top
of wadllib.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-lazr.restfulclient because client for lazr.restful-based web services (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-lazr.restfulclient as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-lazr.restfulclient with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-lazr.restfulclient --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
